<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Logging\TeamCity\Subscriber; use PHPUnit\Event\TestSuite\Finished; use PHPUnit\Event\TestSuite\FinishedSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TestSuiteFinishedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements FinishedSubscriber { public function notify(Finished $event): void { $this->logger()->testSuiteFinished($event); } }
